subcodes.first_line: Say: The verses have indeed descended from the Supreme Kingdom, from the King of Names and Attributes, and through them were the veils rent asunder [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: قل الایات قد نزلت من جبروت الاعلی من لدن ملیک الاسماء و الصفات و بها شقت الحجبات
subcodes.subjects: @consolation and comfort, @proclamation to people of the Bayan, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @walking the spiritual path; spiritual wayfaring; the virtuous life, @martyrs and martyrdom
